scripts.cf:project:create: wrangler pages project create angry-j --production-branch main
scripts.cf:d1:create: wrangler d1 create angry-j --binding DB --location apac --update-config
scripts.cf:deploy: npm run build && npm run cf:migrate && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name angry-j --branch main
scripts.pages:dev: npm run build && wrangler pages dev dist
scripts.pages:deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name angry-j
scripts.electron:dev: npm run build && powershell -NoProfile -Command "$env:ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=$null; npx electron ."
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && powershell -NoProfile -Command "$env:ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=$null; npx electron-builder --win portable --x64"
